keyFile.description: Path to service account JSON key file (e.g. your-service-account.json). Alternative to OAuth.

credentialsJson.description: Service account JSON credentials as string. Alternative to keyFile path.

clientId.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (Desktop app). For calendar as pranavjhacoc@gmail.com use OAuth.

refreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token with Calendar scope. Get via OAuth Playground (scope https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar).
